entries.source: "Help me learn supply and demand"
entries.value: "አቅርቦትን እና ፍላጎትን እንድማር እርዳኝ"

entries.source: "Teach me financial modeling"
entries.value: "የፋይናንስ ሞዴሊንግን አስተምረኝ"

entries.source: "Teach me Porter's Five Forces"
entries.value: "የPorter አምስት ኃይሎችን አስተምረኝ"

entries.source: A practical guide to using Interactive Instruction on inspir for foundations learning, with prompts, study loops, and safer AI habits.
entries.value: በinspir ላይ Interactive Instructionን ለመሠረታዊ ትምህርት መማር ለመጠቀም ተግባራዊ መመሪያ፣ ከፕሮምፕቶች፣ የጥናት ዑደቶች እና ይበልጥ ደህና የኤአይ ልምዶች ጋር።

entries.source: A stronger study loop
entries.value: ይበልጥ ጠንካራ የጥናት ዑደት

entries.source: Adapt the session to your goal.
entries.value: ክፍለ ጊዜውን ከግብዎ ጋር ያስተካክሉ።

entries.source: Adaptive lessons that make you do.
entries.value: እንዲሠሩ የሚያደርጉ ተለዋዋጭ ትምህርቶች።

entries.source: AI tutor
entries.value: የኤአይ አስጠኚ

entries.source: Ask for a small first step rather than a final answer.
entries.value: የመጨረሻ መልስ ከመጠየቅ ይልቅ ትንሽ የመጀመሪያ ደረጃ ይጠይቁ።

entries.source: Ask the AI to check your reasoning, not just the result.
entries.value: ኤአይውን ውጤቱን ብቻ ሳይሆን የምክንያት አሰራርዎን እንዲያረጋግጥ ይጠይቁ።

entries.source: Finish by writing the idea back from memory.
entries.value: ሐሳቡን ከትውስታ መልሰው በመጻፍ ይጨርሱ።

entries.source: Foundations
entries.value: መሰረታዊ ነገሮች

entries.source: Interactive Instruction
entries.value: በይነተገናኝ መመሪያ

entries.source: Interactive Instruction AI Learning Mode is a focused way to use AI for learning instead of passive answer collection. The mode is built around a specific job: Learn by doing, seeing, comparing, repairing, and proving mastery. The app builds a live lesson canvas around your goal instead of turning instruction into a long chat. Try: "Teach me financial modeling."
entries.value: Interactive Instruction AI Learning Mode ኤአይን ለመማር ለመጠቀም የተተኮረ መንገድ ነው፣ ተገብሮ መልሶችን ለመሰብሰብ አይደለም። ሁነታው በተወሰነ ሥራ ዙሪያ የተገነባ ነው፦ በማድረግ፣ በማየት፣ በማነጻጸር፣ በማረም እና ብቃትን በማረጋገጥ ይማሩ። መተግበሪያው ትምህርትን ረጅም ቻት ከማድረግ ይልቅ በግብዎ ዙሪያ ቀጥታ የትምህርት canvas ይገነባል። ይሞክሩ፦ "Teach me financial modeling."

entries.source: Interactive Instruction AI Learning Mode: practical guide
entries.value: Interactive Instruction AI Learning Mode፦ ተግባራዊ መመሪያ

entries.source: Learners exploring foundations topics who want practical guidance instead of a generic answer box.
entries.value: አጠቃላይ የመልስ ሳጥን ከመጠቀም ይልቅ ተግባራዊ መመሪያ የሚፈልጉ የመሰረታዊ ርዕሶችን የሚቃኙ ተማሪዎች።

entries.source: Prompts to try
entries.value: ለመሞከር ጥያቄ መነሻዎች

entries.source: Start the live mode at Interactive Instruction. If you want a neighboring learning format, try Quiz me on Trivia. For a broader view of the platform, read what an AI learning companion should do for everyone.
entries.value: ቀጥታ ሁነታውን በInteractive Instruction ይጀምሩ። ተቀራራቢ የመማር ቅርጽ ከፈለጉ፣ Quiz me on Triviaን ይሞክሩ። መድረኩን በሰፊው ለማየት፣ የኤአይ የመማር አጋር ለሁሉም ምን ማድረግ እንዳለበት ያንብቡ።

entries.source: Start with example prompts.
entries.value: በምሳሌ ጥያቄ መነሻዎች ይጀምሩ።

entries.source: Tell the mode what you are trying to learn or produce.
entries.value: ምን ለመማር ወይም ለማምረት እንደሚሞክሩ ለሁነታው ይንገሩ።

entries.source: That difference shows up in the flow. Instead of one giant response, the best sessions move through a loop: set a goal, try something, get feedback, repair the weak spot, and choose the next action.
entries.value: ያ ልዩነት በፍሰቱ ውስጥ ይታያል። ከአንድ ግዙፍ መልስ ይልቅ፣ ምርጥ ክፍለ-ጊዜዎች በዑደት ይንቀሳቀሳሉ፦ ግብ ያዘጋጁ፣ ነገር ይሞክሩ፣ ግብረመልስ ያግኙ፣ ደካማውን ቦታ ያስተካክሉ እና ቀጣዩን እርምጃ ይምረጡ።

entries.source: That focus matters. A general chatbot can answer almost anything, but a learning mode gives the conversation a shape. It nudges you toward the kind of thinking, practice, feedback, or exploration that helps the idea stick.
entries.value: ያ ትኩረት አስፈላጊ ነው። አጠቃላይ chatbot በአብዛኛው ነገር ሊመልስ ይችላል፣ ግን የመማር ሁነታ ለውይይቱ ቅርጽ ይሰጣል። ሐሳቡ እንዲጣበቅ ወደሚረዳ አስተሳሰብ፣ ልምምድ፣ ግብረመልስ ወይም ምርመራ ይገፋፋዎታል።

entries.source: This is the same habit behind studying with AI without cheating yourself: keep the learner active. AI is most useful when it gives you feedback on your thinking.
entries.value: ይህ ራስዎን ሳታጭበረብሩ በAI ስለመጥናት ካለው ተመሳሳይ ልማድ ይመጣል፦ ተማሪውን ንቁ አድርጉ። AI በአስተሳሰብዎ ላይ ግብረመልስ ሲሰጥዎ በጣም ጠቃሚ ነው።

entries.source: This mode is especially useful for learners who want to:
entries.value: ይህ ሁነታ በተለይ እንዲህ ማድረግ ለሚፈልጉ ተማሪዎች ጠቃሚ ነው፦

entries.source: This mode is tuned for interactive instruction with its own prompts, examples, and learning flow.
entries.value: ይህ ሁነታ በራሱ ፕሮምፕቶች፣ ምሳሌዎች እና የመማር ፍሰት ለinteractive instruction ተስተካክሏል።

entries.source: Try the step in your own words.
entries.value: the step in your own words.ን ሞክር

entries.source: Use Interactive Instruction when you want a session that starts quickly but still adapts to you. The first goal is not to sound impressive. The first goal is to make the next step feel possible.
entries.value: በፍጥነት የሚጀምር ግን እርስዎን የሚስማማ ክፍለ ጊዜ ሲፈልጉ Interactive Instructionን ይጠቀሙ። የመጀመሪያው ግብ አስደናቂ መስማት አይደለም። የመጀመሪያው ግብ ቀጣዩን ደረጃ የሚቻል እንዲመስል ማድረግ ነው።

entries.source: What this mode helps with
entries.value: ይህ ሁነታ ምን ይረዳል

entries.source: Where to go next
entries.value: ቀጥሎ ወዴት መሄድ

entries.source: You can also start with a rough version of your real problem. A messy first prompt is fine. The session can clarify the level, audience, deadline, and style once you begin.
entries.value: በእውነተኛ ችግኝዎ ግርድፍ ስሪት መጀመርም ይችላሉ። የተበታተነ የመጀመሪያ prompt ችግኝ አይደለም። ከጀመሩ በኋላ ክፍለ-ጊዜው level፣ audience፣ deadline እና styleን ሊያብራራ ይችላል።
